title: Piglin Loading Screen
description: This resource pack replaces the standart Mojang logo at boot with the piglin's face. Optifine required.
body:
![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fbc1c480d1d03d8c846ec50641b60ce0f57a6da.png)
The original **Piglin Loading Screen** resourcepack based on my [CurseForge resourcepack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/piglin-loading-screen).

This resource pack replaces the standart Mojang logo at boot with the piglin's face. Optifine required. Enjoy!

_WARNING: versions from 1.19.3 to 1.20.0 inclusive are not supported due to Minecraft or OptiFine bug. Consider using 1.20.1+._

By likespro.
